utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these categories. Each one is fully specified with the appropriate details (coverage types, benefits, costs, and limits for the first three; enhancements and costs for additional_services; breakdown of monthly and annual costs for total_budget). Therefore, all 5 required items are included and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final plan lists three main coverage categories plus additional services. To map them: (1) The health_coverage plan named 'Elite Global Wellness Bundle4' covers both physical and mental health with premium global access and executive-level services, aligning with the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental categories, each rated 10. (2) The property_coverage includes luxury items, jewelry, art, electronics, liability, and temporary accommodation, which best matches 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rated 10). (3) The travel_coverage has global medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage, etc., aligning with 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rated 10). (4) The additional_services list includes concierge, dedicated agent, priority claims, gym reimbursement, wellness programs, and executive stress management. These correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 10), 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 6), and 'Concierge Services' (rating 8) from the ground-truth. Hence, all selected items are mapped to their ratings accordingly.
